name: shifter
description: Firedancer 'Fire with Pattern': a rotating stream of bullets that fly straight, wait, then kink their direction mid-flight (each bullet's own sub-script mutates direction, steering the bullet itself) and continue on to infinity.

startDirection.description: Direction of the first bullet (90 = down)

shiftDelay.description: Frames each bullet flies before the kink

shiftAngle.description: Direction change applied at the kink (degrees)
